state.next-action: BARE V5 PLAYTESTED + EMERGENT V4 RESCORED UPWARD + PROGRAMMATIC-EVAL GAPS AUDIT DONE. Bare v5 rubric: 0.805 (playability 0.70, ui_polish 0.85, mechanics 0.90, ingenuity 0.95, stability 0.55) — highest ingenuity of any round-4 run, multi-enemy encounters, great forge UI, affinity mechanic loved, pressure mechanics landed (subtle hints on map appreciated), but lacks targeting (wants UO-style rule-based combat), affinity reward unclear, no visual map + player location, unclear player/enemy identity in encounters, glitchy redraws across ALL round-4 builds, rune forge bug. Emergent v4 RESCORED 0.805 → 0.885: user beat floor 1 by skipping combat, gathering mana, crafting spells, then fighting warden fresh. Floor is beatable — "fantastic representation of what a game should FEEL like." Playability 0.65 → 0.88, ingenuity 0.80 → 0.95. V5 addendum extended with 9 more requirements (R-v5.13..21): rule-based combat a la Unicorn Overlord, entity-trait action policies for enemies AND NPCs, real-time game-time (1hr=1day, remove ticks), affinity reward loop, central visual nav map with player token, UO-style encounter visuals, spell-mixing-spells with procedural-but-semantic naming, rune uniqueness within a single spell, event-driven rendering to kill per-tick redraw glitches. New decisions: gad-71 (data/ JSON pseudo-database pattern formalized — hand-curated content files at vendor/get-anything-done/data/*.json, read by prebuild, typed into lib/eval-data.generated.ts). NEW SITE SHIPS: (1) Playable Archive cards now show review-status badges (reviewed emerald / needs-review pulsing rose / excluded grey) on both the run picker chips AND the sidebar card, (2) /questions page live rendering data/open-questions.json with 8 seeded open questions across hypothesis/evaluation/site/game-design/tooling/framework categories, (3) Nav gains Questions link. NEW PLANNING DELIVERABLES: .planning/GAPS.md — programmatic-eval gaps audit (task 83/96 done) with 12 ranked gaps, G1 gate-pass + G3 build-exit-code + G11 skill-inheritance-hygiene picked as highest-ROI wins, G4 tool-use-mix named as the reference pattern all new metrics should follow. data/bugs.json seeded with 4 bugs (rune-forge-same-rune-twice, notifications-persist, continue-after-death, glitchy-redraws — all from round 4). NEXT AGENT SESSION PRIORITY ORDER: (1) ASSUMPTIONS.md (task 90) + answer open question target-users-not-documented, (2) G1 gate-pass Playwright harness (task 88's phase 27 track 2) + G3 build-exit-code capture as the two highest-ROI programmatic-eval wins, (3) /roadmap timeline with per-round honest writeup + data-provenance captions on every chart (task 88), (4) /glossary + Term tooltip component (task 87 — unblocks jargon tooltips across all pages), (5) IA refactor with nav dropdowns + keyword search before more pages ship (task 84 — nav is now at 12 items with Questions added), (6) skills directory with copy (task 85), (7) /security page (task 86), (8) investigate HTTP 529 + promote v5 requirements into real REQUIREMENTS.xml + retry GAD v11 serially, (9) codex-vs-claude comparison implementation (task 89). Round 5 still hard-blocked on v5 promotion. Round 4 anchor context: v5 addendum at `evals/_v5-requirements-addendum.md` now has 21 requirements R-v5.01..21, three decisions still load-bearing (gad-68 emergent-evolution, gad-69 programmatic-eval priority, gad-70 Anthropic guide canonical), full backlog tasks 83-98. Do NOT run round 5 against v4 — v5 promotion is a hard prerequisite.
